context: Tests whether the agent applies EnergyKit-specific EV guidance and load-event reporting instructions without broadening into unrelated frameworks.

checklist.name: Capability entitlement
checklist.description: Requires enabling the EnergyKit capability or `com.apple.developer.energykit` entitlement.

checklist.name: Shift guidance
checklist.description: Uses shift-style electricity guidance for EV charging and interprets lower guidance ratings as better windows.

checklist.name: Real token
checklist.description: Uses the guidance token returned by EnergyKit rather than fabricating a placeholder UUID.

checklist.name: Requesting device
checklist.description: States that the device or app that requested guidance should submit the corresponding load events.

checklist.name: Session lifecycle
checklist.description: Reports a begin, active, and end load-event lifecycle for the charging session.

checklist.name: EV cadence
checklist.description: Includes steady EV sampling about every 15 minutes and additional events for meaningful charging changes.

checklist.name: Batching
checklist.description: Recommends batching submitted load events when practical for performance.

checklist.name: Stable identifiers
checklist.description: Uses stable device/session identity instead of per-event random identifiers for the managed vehicle or charger.

checklist.name: Boundary control
checklist.description: Does not turn the answer into HomeKit automation, Core Bluetooth pairing, or BackgroundTasks setup guidance.
